case_title: CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ROGER MORALES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF SARAH JANE REYNOLDS IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: DEFAULT AND/OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62136467) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, ROGER AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-25-2017
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62136467) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60595522), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED MAY-10-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, ROGER AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $315.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62136467) AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, ROGER AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, ROGER AN INDIVIDUAL $1,109.10 PRINCIPAL, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,424.10, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION DECLARATION OF REBEKAH MOORE IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 AND CCP 1033(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 62136467) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62244759)
